Imports

dxgitype, vtable

Types

DXGI_ADAPTER_DESC = object
  Description*: array[128, pointer]
  VendorId*: uint32
  DeviceId*: uint32
  SubSysId*: uint32
  Revision*: uint32
  DedicatedVideoMemory*: csize_t
  DedicatedSystemMemory*: csize_t
  SharedSystemMemory*: csize_t
  AdapterLuid*: uint64
Source   Edit   
DXGI_ADAPTER_DESC1 = object
  Description*: array[128, pointer]
  VendorId*: uint32
  DeviceId*: uint32
  SubSysId*: uint32
  Revision*: uint32
  DedicatedVideoMemory*: csize_t
  DedicatedSystemMemory*: csize_t
  SharedSystemMemory*: csize_t
  AdapterLuid*: uint64
  Flags*: uint32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_DISPLAY_COLOR_SPACE = object
  PrimaryCoordinates*: array[8, float32]
  WhitePoints*: array[16, float32]
Source   Edit   
DXGI_FRAME_STATISTICS = object
  PresentCount*: uint32
  PresentRefreshCount*: uint32
  SyncRefreshCount*: uint32
  SyncQPCTime*: int64
  SyncGPUTime*: int64
Source   Edit   
DXGI_MAPPED_RECT = object
  Pitch*: int32
  pBits*: ptr uint8
Source   Edit   
DXGI_OUTPUT_DESC = object
  DeviceName*: array[32, pointer]
  DesktopCoordinates*: pointer
  AttachedToDesktop*: int32
  Rotation*: uint32
  Monitor*: pointer
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SHARED_RESOURCE = object
  Handle*: pointer
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SURFACE_DESC = object
  Width*: uint32
  Height*: uint32
  Format*: uint32
  SampleDesc*: DXGI_SAMPLE_DESC
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC = object
  BufferDesc*: DXGI_MODE_DESC
  SampleDesc*: DXGI_SAMPLE_DESC
  BufferUsage*: uint32
  BufferCount*: uint32
  OutputWindow*: pointer
  Windowed*: int32
  SwapEffect*: uint32
  Flags*: uint32
Source   Edit

Source   Edit

proc setPrivateDataInterface(self: IDXGIObject; guid: pointer;
                             objectField: pointer) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc takeOwnership(self: IDXGIOutput; device: pointer; exclusive: int32) {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc unmap(self: IDXGISurface) {....raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect],
                                 forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc waitForVBlank(self: IDXGIOutput) {....raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect],
                                        forbids: [].}
Source   Edit
